examples: Her father, Joel, is an ophthalmologist.
I ran into my office and frantically called my ophthalmologist.
Ann Henry taught at the Business School; her husband, Morriss, was an ophthalmologist and our state senator.
His cardiologist and ophthalmologist advised he continue using Lucentis after he suffered two heart attacks.
The decision to go to an optometrist versus an ophthalmologist is a personal one.
